\caption{Gammex flow phantom structural-label operating points using B-mode-derived structural masks. All scores are right-tail (higher indicates more flow evidence). This is a same-residual detector-head comparison: every row is evaluated on the identical baseline SVD band-pass residual cube, changing only the detector head. The baseline rows are power Doppler and Kasai lag-1 power on that residual; the detector ablations replace the fully whitened matched-subspace detector with either total whitened slow-time power (no Doppler band partition) or the same flow-band matched-subspace ratio without covariance whitening ($R=I$). Thresholds are chosen per method on pooled background pixels to match each target FPR and evaluated on pooled lumen pixels. Brackets show 95\% frame-bootstrap CIs ($n=2000$ resamples over cine frames) at the fixed pooled threshold. Pooled background counts are $n_{\mathrm{bg}}=3.85\times 10^{6}$ for the along view ($fpr_{\min}\approx 2.6\times 10^{-7}$) and $n_{\mathrm{bg}}=1.97\times 10^{6}$ for the across view ($fpr_{\min}\approx 5.1\times 10^{-7}$). Reproducibility details are provided in \SuppOrApp{app:repro}.}
\label{tab:twinkling_gammex_structural_roc}
\end{table}
